---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What friction or limitation are you running into?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see. Be specific about the expected behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to related issues, or any other relevant information.
